features.evidence: len noa s yoga series of laptops are really good but let s be honest a lot of us couldn t care less about the yoga part in fact we d much rather prefer a laptop without the 211 functionality and that s where the new slim 7 comes to play this premium laptop has all the best elements without the unnecessary 2inone functionality a lot of people to avoid such as myself the configuration we have over here is rocking some of the newest hardware including intel s core ultra 5 series processor 6 gab of lp ddr5x memory we also have a reasonably large 1 tb ssd and to go with that we ve got intel s integrated arc graphics we also have wi fi 6c and bluetooth five standards on board and finally this is a 14in oled screen there is a lot to dive into with this laptop it really is in a very interesting place and i am really excited to review it so let s get into it i don t want to spend a ton of time on the unpackaging part cuz it s pretty boring lenovo doesn t really do anything special here once you open up the box inside first and foremost of course behind a ton of protective packaging you have the slim 7 itself and then past that you have a allin1 65 wat usbc based charging adapter which is pretty convenient and that s pretty much everything lenovo slim 7 has some of the best design elements in the laptop market it takes some of the most iconic things about the yoga series the rounded corners and edges combined with the super sleek form factor but takes it a step further because it doesn t have to bear the responsibility of carrying a dedicated two in one system the hinge is slightly smaller thereby making the device even sleeker in design and also it s a relatively light 14 in laptop at just 3 However, this is probably because the 14 in has the same size battery as the 15, but a smaller, lower resolution oled display to power

5 mm key travel here with a dish style keyboard which means you get exceptional tactility it feels great to type on and honestly this keyboard has no business being as amazing as it is given the form factor of this machine it s a solid 11 out of 10 in that department if you ever feel useless just remember that the slim 7 literally has two sudo speaker grills on either side of the keyboard that aren t speaker grills nor are the cooling vents they re just there for no good reason whatsoever anyway once you get to the hinge quality it s pretty impressive there s not a lot of wobble it s well tuned and honestly i have nothing but good things to say also it s got a 180 tilt factor now as far as display fitting go you do have a nice glass surface finish so no plastic clippings however you do have a notable chin at the bottom which is odd though the bezels are nice narrow and thin which gives it a clean immersive look and then at the top again you have a fairly thin for head though you do get a bit of a bump around the centry area because that s where you have the full hd irr webcam which is pretty decent in overall quality still watching i m so happy to see that i want to request if you re enjoying the content please consider subscribing this channel and liking this video it puts food on the table because this is literally my living and of course it keeps me motivated to provide more content just this for you awesome viewers so no more time wasting let s continue the display on this laptop is so close to perfect but then lenovo just drops the ball out of no on a couple of things which makes it a good display rather than a great one so things start off perfect with that gorgeous oled panel which is stunning to look at however you only have a mere full hd plus resolution a laptop this should have at least had 2k or higher though you do get a 16 x 10 aspect ratio but then you only get a 60 hz base refresh rate which is honestly just unacceptable 120 should have been the minimum here but then things get good again cuz you have a 400 nit sustained brightness rating with up to 500 nits with peak hdr again amazing and then you also have a built in blue light filter to make things even better you do have built in touch captivity and the touch system is super responsive though keep in mind this is not a two in one device should get yoga if that s what you re looking for and then we come to the color accuracy which is stunning as well you have a 100 dci pay3 color gamut rating and of course also 100 srgb rating this is a great laptop for creative needs photo or video editing thanks to the high degree of color accuracy a quick recap of the performance specs we have here so we do have intel s core ultra 5 series on this machine though you can upgrade that to a more powerful core ultra 7 processor additionally we do get 16 gb of lp ddr5x memory which can also be configured to a higher 32 gb and then we do have intel s integrated arc graphics now day to day performance of this machine is obviously going to be pretty darn good as you d expect web browsing word crunching all easy peasy more demanding activities performed quite well such as programming for example and code compilation which was a smooth breeze even at 16 gb of ram for this laptop 3d blender animations are also quite possible though of course you will get some frame drops and lag but still a viable workflow even 4k multi layer editing seems to be really good this is the first laptop top i ve reviewed with a core ultra 5 processor that isn t performing worse than the 13th agen i5 for i7 chip you ve got smooth frames here there is the occasional delay in playback and some frame drops but again given that we re editing in 4k multi layer performance here was decent which to me proves that with more optimization over time we will see core ultra cizar processors outperform the 13th generation ier series processors but at the time of this video that s still on the fence gaming performance again into arc graphics here are phenomenal given that they re working in an integrated capacity we re able to sustain 60 plus frames per second at upper medium settings with games fortnite which really isn t something a laptop this is expected to do a lot of the performance success here is attributed to the thermals of this laptop which are honestly impressive so under unrealistic peak loads this laptop only hit a max average surface temperature of 38 c with more realistic sustain loads around 35 celsius these are unheard numbers for intel and that shows that the core series has come a long way into improving heat efficiency now fan noise is equally as impressive under more sustained workloads you ll stay around the mid 40s decibel wise and then under absolute peak los you hit 49 db which again is a pretty reasonable number from a self upgradability perspective it is imperative you get the right configuration ram for your needs cuz ram is entirely soldered it cannot be upgraded in any way or form unfortunately ely as far as the storage goes you do have one m

len noa s yoga series of laptops are really good but let s be honest a lot of us couldn t care less about the yoga part in fact we d much rather prefer a laptop without the 211 functionality and that s where the new slim 7 comes to play this premium laptop has all the best elements without the unnecessary 2inone functionality a lot of people to avoid such as myself the configuration we have over here is rocking some of the newest hardware including intel s core ultra 5 series processor 6 gab of lp ddr5x memory we also have a reasonably large 1 tb ssd and to go with that we ve got intel s integrated arc graphics we also have wi fi 6c and bluetooth five standards on board and finally this is a 14in oled screen there is a lot to dive into with this laptop it really is in a very interesting place and i am really excited to review it so let s get into it i don t want to spend a ton of time on the unpackaging part cuz it s pretty boring lenovo doesn t really do anything special here once you open up the box inside first and foremost of course behind a ton of protective packaging you have the slim 7 itself and then past that you have a allin1 65 wat usbc based charging adapter which is pretty convenient and that s pretty much everything lenovo slim 7 has some of the best design elements in the laptop market it takes some of the most iconic things about the yoga series the rounded corners and edges combined with the super sleek form factor but takes it a step further because it doesn t have to bear the responsibility of carrying a dedicated two in one system the hinge is slightly smaller thereby making the device even sleeker in design and also it s a relatively light 14 in laptop at just 3

len noa s yoga series of laptops are really good but let s be honest a lot of us couldn t care less about the yoga part in fact we d much rather prefer a laptop without the 211 functionality and that s where the new slim 7 comes to play this premium laptop has all the best elements without the unnecessary 2inone functionality a lot of people to avoid such as myself the configuration we have over here is rocking some of the newest hardware including intel s core ultra 5 series processor 6 gab of lp ddr5x memory we also have a reasonably large 1 tb ssd and to go with that we ve got intel s integrated arc graphics we also have wi fi 6c and bluetooth five standards on board and finally this is a 14in oled screen there is a lot to dive into with this laptop it really is in a very interesting place and i am really excited to review it so let s get into it i don t want to spend a ton of time on the unpackaging part cuz it s pretty boring lenovo doesn t really do anything special here once you open up the box inside first and foremost of course behind a ton of protective packaging you have the slim 7 itself and then past that you have a allin1 65 wat usbc based charging adapter which is pretty convenient and that s pretty much everything lenovo slim 7 has some of the best design elements in the laptop market it takes some of the most iconic things about the yoga series the rounded corners and edges combined with the super sleek form factor but takes it a step further because it doesn t have to bear the responsibility of carrying a dedicated two in one system the hinge is slightly smaller thereby making the device even sleeker in design and also it s a relatively light 14 in laptop at just 3 However, this new amd ryzen ai300 processor comes with the latest 8 gen 5 cpu cores that brings some crazy clock speeds

1 port which is nice to see two fully loaded thunderbolt 4 usb c ports on the other side you have a usba super speed port and of course a headphone jack the only thing that s really missing here is a sd card reader or at least a micro sd card reader given this is a high end productivity laptop that port really shouldn t be missing here but other than that things are looking pretty good the bottom side of this laptop as you can see has a very simple metallic exterior the lid is removable and then you also have these linear air intake fence now you ll also notice that the speaker system system is bottom firing and the speaker grills are located on the bottom side here when you unfold this laptop you re wow laptop manufacturers can make some pretty darn good stuff when they re not trying to cheap out the slim 7 is a prime example that clean metallic exterior with that flat surface and premium palmrest just looks so majestic and is super well executed at the center of which you have a reasonably large glass surface trackpad which of course means that it s super premium feeling and additionally it has little to no flex because of its rigid surface type and not just that it s also pretty tactile and i definitely say this is one of the better trackpads i ve reviewed on a premium laptop recently i ve always appreciated lenovo for their emphasis on high quality keyboards on their laptops but the slim 7 just takes us to a whole new level honestly firstly you have nice large key caps in typical lenovo fashion the font is easy to read and it s clear the only thing really annoying here are those compressed up and down arrow keys but i can tolerate those given the rest of the keyboard additionally it is fully backlit and it gets pretty bright all things considered since this is a 14 in laptop you will not be getting a 10 key number pad and also there s no built in fingerprint scanner though you do have ir technology now what i love about this keyboard by far is the fact that given how sleek this keyboard or sorry this laptop is you have one

len noa s yoga series of laptops are really good but let s be honest a lot of us couldn t care less about the yoga part in fact we d much rather prefer a laptop without the 211 functionality and that s where the new slim 7 comes to play this premium laptop has all the best elements without the unnecessary 2inone functionality a lot of people to avoid such as myself the configuration we have over here is rocking some of the newest hardware including intel s core ultra 5 series processor 6 gab of lp ddr5x memory we also have a reasonably large 1 tb ssd and to go with that we ve got intel s integrated arc graphics we also have wi fi 6c and bluetooth five standards on board and finally this is a 14in oled screen there is a lot to dive into with this laptop it really is in a very interesting place and i am really excited to review it so let s get into it i don t want to spend a ton of time on the unpackaging part cuz it s pretty boring lenovo doesn t really do anything special here once you open up the box inside first and foremost of course behind a ton of protective packaging you have the slim 7 itself and then past that you have a allin1 65 wat usbc based charging adapter which is pretty convenient and that s pretty much everything lenovo slim 7 has some of the best design elements in the laptop market it takes some of the most iconic things about the yoga series the rounded corners and edges combined with the super sleek form factor but takes it a step further because it doesn t have to bear the responsibility of carrying a dedicated two in one system the hinge is slightly smaller thereby making the device even sleeker in design and also it s a relatively light 14 in laptop at just 3

5 mm key travel here with a dish style keyboard which means you get exceptional tactility it feels great to type on and honestly this keyboard has no business being as amazing as it is given the form factor of this machine it s a solid 11 out of 10 in that department if you ever feel useless just remember that the slim 7 literally has two sudo speaker grills on either side of the keyboard that aren t speaker grills nor are the cooling vents they re just there for no good reason whatsoever anyway once you get to the hinge quality it s pretty impressive there s not a lot of wobble it s well tuned and honestly i have nothing but good things to say also it s got a 180 tilt factor now as far as display fitting go you do have a nice glass surface finish so no plastic clippings however you do have a notable chin at the bottom which is odd though the bezels are nice narrow and thin which gives it a clean immersive look and then at the top again you have a fairly thin for head though you do get a bit of a bump around the centry area because that s where you have the full hd irr webcam which is pretty decent in overall quality still watching i m so happy to see that i want to request if you re enjoying the content please consider subscribing this channel and liking this video it puts food on the table because this is literally my living and of course it keeps me motivated to provide more content just this for you awesome viewers so no more time wasting let s continue the display on this laptop is so close to perfect but then lenovo just drops the ball out of no on a couple of things which makes it a good display rather than a great one so things start off perfect with that gorgeous oled panel which is stunning to look at however you only have a mere full hd plus resolution a laptop this should have at least had 2k or higher though you do get a 16 x 10 aspect ratio but then you only get a 60 hz base refresh rate which is honestly just unacceptable 120 should have been the minimum here but then things get good again cuz you have a 400 nit sustained brightness rating with up to 500 nits with peak hdr again amazing and then you also have a built in blue light filter to make things even better you do have built in touch captivity and the touch system is super responsive though keep in mind this is not a two in one device should get yoga if that s what you re looking for and then we come to the color accuracy which is stunning as well you have a 100 dci pay3 color gamut rating and of course also 100 srgb rating this is a great laptop for creative needs photo or video editing thanks to the high degree of color accuracy a quick recap of the performance specs we have here so we do have intel s core ultra 5 series on this machine though you can upgrade that to a more powerful core ultra 7 processor additionally we do get 16 gb of lp ddr5x memory which can also be configured to a higher 32 gb and then we do have intel s integrated arc graphics now day to day performance of this machine is obviously going to be pretty darn good as you d expect web browsing word crunching all easy peasy more demanding activities performed quite well such as programming for example and code compilation which was a smooth breeze even at 16 gb of ram for this laptop 3d blender animations are also quite possible though of course you will get some frame drops and lag but still a viable workflow even 4k multi layer editing seems to be really good this is the first laptop top i ve reviewed with a core ultra 5 processor that isn t performing worse than the 13th agen i5 for i7 chip you ve got smooth frames here there is the occasional delay in playback and some frame drops but again given that we re editing in 4k multi layer performance here was decent which to me proves that with more optimization over time we will see core ultra cizar processors outperform the 13th generation ier series processors but at the time of this video that s still on the fence gaming performance again into arc graphics here are phenomenal given that they re working in an integrated capacity we re able to sustain 60 plus frames per second at upper medium settings with games fortnite which really isn t something a laptop this is expected to do a lot of the performance success here is attributed to the thermals of this laptop which are honestly impressive so under unrealistic peak loads this laptop only hit a max average surface temperature of 38 c with more realistic sustain loads around 35 celsius these are unheard numbers for intel and that shows that the core series has come a long way into improving heat efficiency now fan noise is equally as impressive under more sustained workloads you ll stay around the mid 40s decibel wise and then under absolute peak los you hit 49 db which again is a pretty reasonable number from a self upgradability perspective it is imperative you get the right configuration ram for your needs cuz ram is entirely soldered it cannot be upgraded in any way or form unfortunately ely as far as the storage goes you do have one m

review_summary: len noa s yoga series of laptops are really good but let s be honest a lot of us couldn t care less about the yoga part in fact we d much rather prefer a laptop without the 211 functionality and that s where the new slim 7 comes to play this premium laptop has all the best elements without the unnecessary 2inone functionality a lot of people to avoid such as myself the configuration we have over here is rocking some of the newest hardware including intel s core ultra 5 series processor 6 gab of lp ddr5x memory we also have a reasonably large 1 tb ssd and to go with that we ve got intel s integrated arc graphics we also have wi fi 6c and bluetooth five standards on board and finally this is a 14in oled screen there is a lot to dive into with this laptop it really is in a very interesting place and i am really excited to review it so let s get into it i don t want to spend a ton of time on the unpackaging part cuz it s pretty boring lenovo doesn t really do anything special here once you open up the box inside first and foremost of course behind a ton of protective packaging you have the slim 7 itself and then past that you have a allin1 65 wat usbc based charging adapter which is pretty convenient and that s pretty much everything lenovo slim 7 has some of the best design elements in the laptop market it takes some of the most iconic things about the yoga series the rounded corners and edges combined with the super sleek form factor but takes it a step further because it doesn t have to bear the responsibility of carrying a dedicated two in one system the hinge is slightly smaller thereby making the device even sleeker in design and also it s a relatively light 14 in laptop at just 3 However, this is probably because the 14 in has the same size battery as the 15, but a smaller, lower resolution oled display to power 5 mm key travel here with a dish style keyboard which means you get exceptional tactility it feels great to type on and honestly this keyboard has no business being as amazing as it is given the form factor of this machine it s a solid 11 out of 10 in that department if you ever feel useless just remember that the slim 7 literally has two sudo speaker grills on either side of the keyboard that aren t speaker grills nor are the cooling vents they re just there for no good reason whatsoever anyway once you get to the hinge quality it s pretty impressive there s not a lot of wobble it s well tuned and honestly i have nothing but good things to say also it s got a 180 tilt factor now as far as display fitting go you do have a nice glass surface finish so no plastic clippings however you do have a notable chin at the bottom which is odd though the bezels are nice narrow and thin which gives it a clean immersive look and then at the top again you have a fairly thin for head though you do get a bit of a bump around the centry area because that s where you have the full hd irr webcam which is pretty decent in overall quality still watching i m so happy to see that i want to request if you re enjoying the content please consider subscribing this channel and liking this video it puts food on the table because this is literally my living and of course it keeps me motivated to provide more content just this for you awesome viewers so no more time wasting let s continue the display on this oled panel which is stunning to look at however you only have a mere full hd plus resolution a laptop this should have at least had 2k or higher though you do get a 16 x 10 aspect ratio but then you only get a 60 hz base refresh rate which is honestly just unacceptable 120 should have been the minimum here but then things get good again cuz you have a 400 nit sustained brightness rating with up to 500 nits with peak hdr again amazing and then you also have a built in blue light filter to make things even better you do have built in touch captivity and the touch system is super responsive though keep in mind this is not a two in one device should get yoga if that s what you re looking for and then we come to the color accuracy which is stunning as well you have a 100 dci pay3 color gamut rating and of course also 100 srgb rating this is a great laptop for creative needs photo or video editing thanks to the high degree of color accuracy a quick recap of the performance specs we have here so we do have intel s core ultra 5 series on this machine though you can upgrade that to a more powerful core ultra 7 processor additionally we do get 16 gb of lp ddr5x memory which can also be configured to a higher 32 gb and then we do have intel s integrated arc graphics now day to day performance of this machine is obviously going to be pretty darn good as you d expect web browsing word crunching all easy peasy more demanding activities performed quite well such as programming for example and code compilation which was a smooth breeze even at 16 gb of ram for this laptop 3d blender animations are also quite possible though of course you will get some frame drops and lag but still a viable workflow even 4k multi layer editing seems to be really good this is the first success here is attributed to the thermals of this laptop which are honestly impressive so under unrealistic peak loads this laptop only hit a max average surface temperature of 38 c with more realistic sustain loads around 35 celsius these are unheard numbers for intel and that shows that the core series has come a long way into improving heat efficiency now fan noise is equally as impressive under more sustained workloads you ll stay around the mid 40s decibel wise and then under absolute peak los you hit 49 db which again is a pretty reasonable number from a self upgradability perspective it is imperative you get the right configuration ram for your needs cuz ram is entirely soldered it cannot be upgraded in any way or form unfortunately ely as far as the storage goes you
